prompt: You are given two images. Image 1 is a photograph of a woman seated on a whitewashed stone ledge in a sunny Greek-island (Milos) lane, wearing a navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress. Image 2 is a portrait of our model. Edit Image 1 so the seated woman has the FACE and facial identity of the woman in Image 2: the same face shape, features, eyes, nose, lips, warm golden-olive skin with light freckles, and her long warm dark-brown softly waved hair. Keep the hair a similar length and let it fall naturally as in Image 1. Keep EVERYTHING ELSE in Image 1 exactly the same: the navy-and-white pinstripe dress (every stripe, the gathered neckline, ruched waist, tiers and hem), her body, seated pose, hands, the black strappy sandals, the whitewashed ledge, plaster wall, stone steps, the sea, and the warm late-afternoon sunlight and all its shadows. Do not change the dress, the setting, or the lighting. Photorealistic; the new face must be lit by the same warm side light as the rest of the scene.
